@startuml
actor TaskControl
participant Reins_Agent as RA #LightBlue2
control ExecCommands as EC #LightGreen3
entity HostRegistry as HR #YellowOrange

== connection check ==
TaskControl ->> RA : [01] identified_key\n[all_clients]\nloop all clients do... end loop
RA->EC:[02]check(identified_key) 
activate EC  
note over  EC:connection check   
    activate EC    
   alt varid?(identified_key)\nis true then \nelse false     
      note right of EC#LineRed:X      
       deactivate EC       
     else        
        return status         
         endif          
          deactivate EC           
           opt logging_status            
            rect rgb(248, 255, 267)               
             box "logging"                
              participant LogFile              
               group log file creation                 
                create FileHandler fh                  
                 FH-->>FH:new()                   
                  Note left on link                     
                   The object was created just now                    
                    EndNote                      
                     RH-->fh:create(filename.txt)                       
                      destroy FH                        
                       Group destruction                          
                        Destroyed objects are marked like this                           
                         Deactivate All                            
                          Return Status                             
                           Opt Logging_Status                              
                            Rect Rgb(249 ,255 ,268 )                                
                             Box 'Logging'                                  
                              Participant logfile                                   
                               Group logfilecreation                                    
                                Createfilehandler Fh                                     
                                 fH -- >>f h new ()                                       
                                  Notelinkonlink                                         
                                   Objectcreatednow!
